title: stylidium cornuatum
intro: Stylidium cornuatum, also known as the horned triggerplant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stylidiaceae, native to Western Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stylidium cornuatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide relief from gastrointestinal issues. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use through drying and infusion, or made into a tincture or decoction for its medicinal properties.
